name: Election to Treat Real Property Inventory as Depreciable

eligibility.description: Taxpayers holding real estate inventory who have excluded debt discharge income and wish to prioritize basis reduction on those specific assets.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Taxpayers may elect to treat real property held for sale to customers (inventory) as depreciable property for the purpose of basis reduction following debt discharge.
